Built for both sides of the journey

Whether you run a lodge in Livingstone or you're planning your next trip, Zambia Explorer gives you a direct line to each other.

For business owners

Get discovered by travellers searching by province

  • List your lodge, tour, transport or craft business
  • Choose Premium or Featured and try it free for 1 month
  • Go live once our team reviews your listing
  • Get found by category, province and rating
For travellers

Plan a trip built on local knowledge, not guesswork

  • Browse verified lodges, guides and tours by province
  • Read real stories from other travellers
  • Check events, etiquette and safety before you go
  • Save places and build your own itinerary

One free month, on us

Pick a plan when you list your business. Premium and Featured start with a full month at no cost — cancel any time before it ends and pay nothing.

From submission to live, in three steps

1

List your business

Add your details and choose a plan. Takes about two minutes.

2

Our team reviews it

Every listing is checked before it reaches travellers.

3

You go live

Your listing appears in the directory, sorted by plan tier.

Your first month is free. Your next traveller is searching now.

No card required to start. List your business today and pay nothing until your free month ends.

List Your Business

Search your address above and pick the right match — it fills in the coordinates for you. Prefer to do it manually? Open Google Maps, long-press your location, and copy the two numbers into the fields above. Either way is optional; without it you'll still appear in the listings, just not as a map pin.

    Platform

    Settings Centre

    Subscription Pricing

    Primary currency: ZMW (Kwacha) · Also accepted: USD, GBP, EUR, ZAR

    Support: +260 977 638 790 · skumbeni@gmail.com

    How reservations work

    When a visitor taps Request to Book on a live listing, their details and dates are sent here as a reservation request — not a paid, confirmed booking. The business owner (or an admin on their behalf) then contacts the visitor directly to confirm availability and take payment. This keeps the platform simple and avoids holding anyone's money while the directory is young; a payment-collecting upgrade is a natural next step once you're ready for it.
